# David Anderle — llms.txt

Official website: https://davidanderle.com/
Primary identity page: https://davidanderle.com/about-david-anderle
Short bio page: https://davidanderle.com/david-anderle-bio
Flagship research page: https://davidanderle.com/research/systemic-risk-model
Writing archive: https://davidanderle.com/writing
CV page: https://davidanderle.com/cv
Contact page: https://davidanderle.com/contact

Summary:
David Anderle is a University of Wisconsin–Madison exchange student and a Czech University of Life Sciences Prague Informatics student focused on systems, risk, financial systems, and decision-making under uncertainty.
